caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt with the text "CHECK IT" and a black baseball cap sits in a recording studio setting. He wears over-ear headphones and a gold chain necklace. He is positioned in front of a professional condenser microphone on a boom arm. In the background, a white banner features the words "GRIND HUSTLE" repeated with stars, while a red and black sign reads "BOSS TALK 101". On-screen graphics include a logo that says "BOSS TALK PODCAST" and "BOSS TALK 101 By L. Lodge Media". Throughout the sequence, the man remains seated and looks off-camera to his right. In the final frame, he raises his left hand toward his face, resting his chin on his fingers, while his watch is visible on his wrist. The background elements and his clothing remain constant across the scene.
